mapper.select: SELECT B.banner_id, B.title, B.subtitle, REPLACE(B.image_url, '/final_hotel', '') AS image_url, B.sort_order FROM PROMOTION_BANNER B LEFT JOIN PROMOTION_MASTER M ON B.fk_promotion_id = M.promotion_id WHERE B.active_yn = 'Y' AND B.banner_type = 'MAIN' ORDER BY B.sort_order ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RT.room_type_id, RT.fk_hotel_id AS brand_id, RT.room_grade, RT.room_name, RT.view_type, REPLACE(RI.image_url, '/final_hotel', '') AS image_url FROM ROOM_TYPE RT JOIN room_image RI ON RT.room_type_id = RI.room_type_id WHERE RT.is_active = 'Y' AND RI.is_main = 'Y' AND RT.APPROVE_STATUS = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 2

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DINING_ID AS dining_id, FK_HOTEL_ID AS fk_hotel_id, NAME AS name, REPLACE(MAIN_IMG, '/final_hotel', '') AS main_img FROM tbl_dining ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT B.banner_id, B.fk_promotion_id AS promotion_id, B.title, REPLACE(B.image_url, '/final_hotel', '') AS image_url, B.benefits, M.price, TO_CHAR(M.end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_date, M.discount_rate FROM PROMOTION_BANNER B LEFT JOIN PROMOTION_MASTER M ON B.fk_promotion_id = M.promotion_id WHERE B.active_yn = 'Y' AND B.banner_type = 'CARD' AND M.is_active = 1 AND SYSDATE BETWEEN M.start_date AND M.end_date ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE

SELECT RT.room_type_id, RT.room_name, RT.room_grade, RT.bed_type, RT.view_type, RT.max_capacity, RT.base_price, (SELECT REPLACE(image_url, '/final_hotel', '') FROM ROOM_IMAGE RI WHERE RI.room_type_id = RT.room_type_id AND RI.is_main = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS image_url FROM ROOM_TYPE RT WHERE RT.fk_hotel_id = TO_NUMBER(#{hotelId}) AND RT.is_active = 'Y'
AND RT.max_capacity >= TO_NUMBER(#{capacity})
AND RT.room_type_id IN ( SELECT RS.room_type_id FROM ROOM_STOCK RS WHERE RS.stay_date >= TO_DATE(#{checkIn}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND RS.stay_date < TO_DATE(#{checkOut}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND RS.available_count > 0 AND RS.is_closed = 'N' GROUP BY RS.room_type_id HAVING COUNT(*) = TO_DATE(#{checkOut}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - TO_DATE(#{checkIn}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
SELECT hotel_id AS hotel_id, hotel_name AS hotel_name FROM tbl_hotel WHERE active_yn = 'Y' AND approve_status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY hotel_id ASC

SELECT image_id AS image_id, REPLACE(image_url, '/final_hotel', '') AS image_url, is_main AS is_main, sort_order AS sort_order FROM HOTEL_IMAGE WHERE fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} ORDER BY is_main DESC, sort_order ASC

SELECT banner_id AS banner_id, title AS title, subtitle AS subtitle, REPLACE(image_url, '/final_hotel', '') AS image_url, sort_order AS sort_order FROM PROMOTION_BANNER WHERE fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND banner_type = 'MAIN'
mapper.update: MERGE INTO PROMOTION_BANNER B USING DUAL ON (B.fk_hotel_id = #{fk_hotel_id} AND B.banner_type = 'MAIN') WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET title = #{title}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, image_url = REPLACE(#{image_url}, '/final_hotel', ''), sort_order = #{sort_order}, active_yn = 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (banner_id, fk_hotel_id, banner_type, title, subtitle, image_url, sort_order, active_yn) VALUES ( SEQ_PROMO_BANNER_ID.NEXTVAL, #{fk_hotel_id}, 'MAIN', #{title}, #{subtitle}, REPLACE(#{image_url}, '/final_hotel', ''), #{sort_order}, 'Y' )
